mapper.select: SELECT o.*, os.status FROM orders o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT orderid, status FROM orderstatus WHERE (orderid, linenum) IN ( SELECT orderid, MAX(linenum) FROM orderstatus GROUP BY orderid ) ) os ON o.orderid = os.orderid WHERE o.userid = #{userId} ORDER BY o.orderdate DESC

SELECT o.*, os.status FROM orders o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT orderid, status FROM orderstatus WHERE (orderid, linenum) IN ( SELECT orderid, MAX(linenum) FROM orderstatus GROUP BY orderid ) ) os ON o.orderid = os.orderid WHERE o.orderid = #{orderId}

SELECT o.*, os.status FROM orders o LEFT JOIN ( SELECT orderid, status FROM orderstatus WHERE (orderid, linenum) IN ( SELECT orderid, MAX(linenum) FROM orderstatus GROUP BY orderid ) ) os ON o.orderid = os.orderid WHERE DATE(o.orderdate) = CURDATE() ORDER BY o.orderdate DESC

SELECT o.*, os.status FROM orders o INNER JOIN ( SELECT orderid, status FROM orderstatus WHERE (orderid, linenum) IN ( SELECT orderid, MAX(linenum) FROM orderstatus GROUP BY orderid ) ) os ON o.orderid = os.orderid WHERE os.status = 'P' ORDER BY o.orderdate ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET courier = #{courier} WHERE orderid = #{orderId}
UPDATE orders SET status = #{status} WHERE orderid = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(o.totalprice), 0) FROM orders o INNER JOIN ( SELECT orderid, status FROM orderstatus WHERE (orderid, linenum) IN ( SELECT orderid, MAX(linenum) FROM orderstatus GROUP BY orderid ) ) os ON o.orderid = os.orderid WHERE os.status = #{status}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders o INNER JOIN ( SELECT orderid, status FROM orderstatus WHERE (orderid, linenum) IN ( SELECT orderid, MAX(linenum) FROM orderstatus GROUP BY orderid ) ) os ON o.orderid = os.orderid WHERE os.status = #{status}

SELECT COUNT(*) as total_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN os.status = 'P' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as pending_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN os.status = 'A' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as approved_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN os.status = 'R' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as rejected_orders, SUM(CASE WHEN os.status = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as shipped_orders, COALESCE(SUM(o.totalprice), 0) as total_revenue FROM orders o INNER JOIN ( SELECT orderid, status FROM orderstatus WHERE (orderid, linenum) IN ( SELECT orderid, MAX(linenum) FROM orderstatus GROUP BY orderid ) ) os ON o.orderid = os.orderid
